prompt: Estimate or interpret the measurable condition and state why it is out of tolerance.
scenario: In a T1 work setting, the evaluated element is M-101 Baseplates & anchor bolts within 2.7 Equipment & Machinery. The relevant subcategory is 2.7.1 Setting & Grouting. The observed field condition is: grout without vent holes (voids - sounding test). The work is being assessed at the rough-complete lifecycle state with source anchors API RP 686. The measurable cue is visible enough to estimate whether the condition is within tolerance.
title: T1 M-101 Measurement & estimation
